mapper.delete: DELETE FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYyyy} AND VALT_TRN = TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{basYymm},5,2)) AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID IN ( 'P040101', 'P040102', 'P040201', 'P040202', 'P040203', 'P040103', 'P040207' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M ( BAS_YYMM, CNTL_CATG1_C, CNTL_CATG2_C, CNTL_ELMN_C, BRNO , EVAL_TYPE_CD , WRITEN_YN, CNT_PNT, CNTNT, GYLJ_ID, GYLJ_S_C , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM, MM.CNTL_CATG1_C , MM.CNTL_CATG2_C, MM.CNTL_ELMN_C, AA.BRNO , MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD , '0' AS WRITEN_YN , 0 AS CNT_PNT , '' AS CNTNT , 0 AS GYLJ_ID , '0' AS GYLJ_S_C , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,'BATCH' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I AA , SRBA_CNTL_ELMN_M MM WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AA.TGT_YN = '1' AND AA.BAS_YYMM = MM.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = MM.CNTL_ELMN_C AND MM.USE_YN = '1' ORDER BY BRNO , CNTL_ELMN_C

INSERT INTO SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM ( BAS_YYMM, CNTL_CATG1_C, CNTL_CATG2_C, CNTL_ELMN_C, BRNO , CNTL_ITEM_C , CNTL_ITEM_DE_C, SNO , CHECK_YN, CNTL_VALUE , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT BAS_YYMM, CNTL_CATG1_C, CNTL_CATG2_C, CNTL_ELMN_C, BRNO , CNTL_ITEM_C , CNTL_ITEM_DE_C, SNO , CHECK_YN, CNTL_VALUE , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM, BB.CNTL_CATG1_C , BB.CNTL_CATG2_C, BB.CNTL_ELMN_C, AA.BRNO , CASE WHEN MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD = '1' THEN '1' WHEN MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD = '2' THEN 'ERROR' --고객번호 WHEN MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD = '3' THEN '3' --실적입력 ELSE MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD END AS CNTL_ITEM_C , BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AA.CNTL_ELMN_C , AA.BRNO , CNTL_ITEM_C, to_number(BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C) ) AS SNO , '' AS CHECK_YN , 0 AS CNTL_VALUE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME ,'Batch' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I AA , SRBA_CNTL_ITEM_D BB , SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M MM WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AA.TGT_YN = '1' AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = BB.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.BAS_YYMM = MM.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = MM.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.BRNO = MM.BRNO AND MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD IN ( '1', '3' )
UNION ALL
SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM, BB.CNTL_CATG1_C , BB.CNTL_CATG2_C, CU.CNTL_ELMN_C, AA.BRNO , CU.CNTL_ITEM_C , BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AA.CNTL_ELMN_C , AA.BRNO , CU.CNTL_ITEM_C, to_number(BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C) ) AS SNO , '' AS CHECK_YN , 0 AS CNTL_VALUE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'Batch' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I AA , SRBA_CNTL_ITEM_D BB , SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M MM , ( SELECT B.CNTL_ELMN_C , B.BRNO , E.DATA12 AS CNTL_ITEM_C , E.SNO FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I E , SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I B WHERE 1 = 1 AND E.BAS_YYYY = #{basYyyy} AND E.VALT_TRN = TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{basYymm},5,2)) AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.BRNO = E.VALT_BRNO AND B.CNTL_ELMN_C = E.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND E.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID IN ( 'P040101', 'P040102', 'P040201', 'P040202', 'P040203', 'P040103', 'P040207' ) ) CU WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AA.TGT_YN = '1' AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = BB.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.BAS_YYMM = MM.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = MM.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.BRNO = MM.BRNO AND MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD = '2' AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = CU.CNTL_ELMN_C AND CU.BRNO = MM.BRNO ) ORDER BY CNTL_ELMN_C , BRNO , CNTL_ITEM_C, CNTL_ITEM_DE_C

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_LONG FROM SRBA_KRI_D WHERE BAS_YYMM BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnSdt},1,4) AND SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnEdt},1,4) AND BAS_LONG in ( '01', '02' ) --기준반기(00:월집계 , 01: 상반기 , 02: 하반기) ) ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P030504' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM ( SELECT C.* FROM SRBA_KRI_D A ,SRBA_KRI_M B ,SRBA_IMPRV_M_RBA C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = B.RBA_ELMT_C AND A.BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = C.RSK_ELMT_C AND A.BAS_LONG IN ('01' , '02') AND A.BAS_YYMM BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnSdt},1,4) AND SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnEdt},1,4) AND C.IMPRV_STRG_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND C.GYLJ_S_C = '3' ) ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P030505' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM ( SELECT C.* FROM SRBA_KRI_D A ,SRBA_KRI_M B ,SRBA_IMPRV_M_RBA C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = B.RBA_ELMT_C AND A.BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = C.RSK_ELMT_C AND A.BAS_LONG IN ('01' , '02') AND A.BAS_YYMM BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnSdt},1,4) AND SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnEdt},1,4) AND C.IMPRV_STRG_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} ) ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P030505' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM ( SELECT A.APP_NO , A.REG_DT , P.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , P.NUM_SQ , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ( SELECT CNTNT FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'P002' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.APP_NO , M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , M.SNO , M.NUM_SQ , M.SN_CCD FROM AML_APPR M , C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD02' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND ( M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ ) IN ( SELECT /*+ IDEX(M PK_AML_APPR) */ T.APP_NO , MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD02' GROUP BY T.APP_NO ) ) P ON ( A.APP_NO = P.APP_NO ) WHERE 1=1 AND EVLTN_PRF_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} ) A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SN_CCD = 'E' ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P030506' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM ( SELECT A.APP_NO , A.REG_DT , P.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , P.NUM_SQ , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ( SELECT CNTNT FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'P002' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.APP_NO , M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , M.SNO , M.NUM_SQ , M.SN_CCD FROM AML_APPR M , C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD02' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND ( M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ ) IN ( SELECT /*+ IDEX(M PK_AML_APPR) */ T.APP_NO , MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD02' GROUP BY T.APP_NO ) ) P ON ( A.APP_NO = P.APP_NO ) WHERE 1=1 AND EVLTN_PRF_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} ) A WHERE 1=1 ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P030506' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT( RNMCNO ) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND LG_AMT_ASTS_F = 'Y' ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P040204' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT( RNMCNO ) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND LG_AMT_ASTS_F = 'Y' ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P040204' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT RA.RNMCNO ) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , NIC01B CUS , RA_CS_RA_RSLT RA WHERE 1=1 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = CUS.RNMCNO AND RA.RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P040205' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT RNMCNO ) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , NIC01B CUS WHERE 1=1 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = CUS.RNMCNO ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P040205' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM M USING ( SELECT BRNO, COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT A.RNMCNO , B.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD AS BRNO FROM NIC21B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.SRCH_RSLT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO GROUP BY A.RNMCNO , B.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) GROUP BY BRNO ) S ON ( M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P040301' AND M.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1' AND M.BRNO = S.BRNO ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET M.CNTL_VALUE = S.CNT
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X ,( SELECT A.SCNR_ID ,A.SCNR_NM ,NVL(B.USE_YN, 'N') AS USE_YN FROM TMS_REQ A LEFT JOIN TMS_RUN_INFO B ON A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID LEFT JOIN TMS_BZDM_MNG C ON A.BZDM_CD = C.BZDM_CD AND A.BIZ_CD = C.BIZ_CD WHERE 1=1 AND B.USE_YN ='Y' AND A.SCNR_NM LIKE '%고액자산%' AND A.BZDM_CD = '02' ) Y WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND X.SSPS_TYP_CD = Y.SCNR_ID AND X.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050101' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X ,( SELECT A.SCNR_ID ,A.SCNR_NM ,NVL(B.USE_YN, 'N') AS USE_YN FROM TMS_REQ A LEFT JOIN TMS_RUN_INFO B ON A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID LEFT JOIN TMS_BZDM_MNG C ON A.BZDM_CD = C.BZDM_CD AND A.BIZ_CD = C.BIZ_CD WHERE 1=1 AND B.USE_YN ='Y' AND A.SCNR_NM LIKE '%고액자산%' AND A.BZDM_CD = '02' ) Y WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND X.SSPS_TYP_CD = Y.SCNR_ID ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050101' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT ROUND( COUNT(1)*2/100 , 0 ) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050102' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('KYC') /*임의보고*/ AND X.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050103' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT ROUND( COUNT(1)*4/100 , 0 ) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') /*임의보고*/ AND X.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050103' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND X.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' AND X.DL_P_RNMCNO IN ( SELECT DISTINCT DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B WHERE RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR') AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' ) ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050105' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR') AND X.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050105' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , DL_P_RNMCNO , dd, TRUNC(TO_DATE(DD,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - TO_DATE(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),0) AS DU FROM ( SELECT X.* , MAX(RPR_P_DY_TM) OVER (PARTITION BY X.INST_ID ) AS DD /* 최종 결재일 */ FROM NIC66B X, NIC66B_W Y , (SELECT USER_ID FROM SSQ.C_USER_GROUP_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = '104') Z /*보고책임자*/ WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND X.INST_ID = Y.INST_ID AND Z.USER_ID = Y.RPR_P_ENO ) GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , DL_P_RNMCNO, dd, TO_DATE(DD,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) WHERE DU <= 14 ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050201' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '2'

UPDATE SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM SET CNTL_VALUE = ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNTL_VALUE FROM NIC66B X WHERE 1=1 AND X.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = 'P050201' AND CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = '1'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SRBA_FINAL_EVAL ( BAS_YYMM , BRNO , FINAL_LV , FINAL_VAL , FINAL_UP_DOWN , FINAL_COLOR , RISK_VAL , RISK_UP_DOWN , RISK_COLOR , TONGJE_VAL , TONGJE_UP_DOWN , TONGJE_COLOR , BF_FINAL_LV , BF_FINAL_VAL , BF_FINAL_UP_DOWN , BF_FINAL_COLOR , BF_RISK_VAL , BF_RISK_UP_DOWN , BF_RISK_COLOR , BF_TONGJE_VAL , BF_TONGJE_UP_DOWN , BF_TONGJE_COLOR , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , BRNO , '' AS FINAL_LV , JAN AS FINAL_VAL , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN JAN > BF_JAN THEN '▲' WHEN JAN < BF_JAN THEN '▼' ELSE '-' END AS FINAL_UP_DOWN , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '0' WHEN JAN > BF_JAN THEN 'R' WHEN JAN < BF_JAN THEN 'B' ELSE '0' END AS FINAL_COLOR , RISK_VAL AS RISK_VAL , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN RISK_VAL > BF_RISK_VAL THEN '▲' WHEN RISK_VAL < BF_RISK_VAL THEN '▼' ELSE '-' END AS RISK_UP_DOWN , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '0' WHEN RISK_VAL > BF_RISK_VAL THEN 'R' WHEN RISK_VAL < BF_RISK_VAL THEN 'B' ELSE '0' END AS RISK_COLOR , TONGJE_VAL AS TONGJE_VAL , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN TONGJE_VAL > BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN '▲' WHEN TONGJE_VAL < BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN '▼' ELSE '-' END AS TONGJE_UP_DOWN , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '0' WHEN TONGJE_VAL > BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN 'R' WHEN TONGJE_VAL < BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN 'B' ELSE '0' END AS TONGJE_COLOR , '' AS BF_FINAL_LV , DECODE(C.BAS_YYMM ,NULL, '', BF_JAN ) AS BF_FINAL_VAL , '' AS BF_FINAL_UP_DOWN , '' AS BF_FINAL_COLOR , DECODE(C.BAS_YYMM ,NULL, '', BF_RISK_VAL ) AS BF_RISK_VAL , '' AS BF_RISK_UP_DOWN , '' AS BF_RISK_COLOR , DECODE(C.BAS_YYMM ,NULL, '', BF_TONGJE_VAL ) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL , '' AS BF_TONGJE_UP_DOWN , '' AS BF_TONGJE_COLOR , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME ,'BATCH' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT TG.BRNO , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = TG.BRNO ) AS BRNO_NM , ' ' AS LV , CASE WHEN T1.BRNO IS NULL THEN ROUND(RK.RISK_VAL * ( 1 - TG.TONGJE_VAL/100 ), 2 ) ELSE ROUND(RK_ALL.RISK_VAL * ( 1 - TG.TONGJE_VAL/100 ), 2 ) END AS JAN , CASE WHEN T1.BRNO IS NULL THEN RK.RISK_VAL ELSE RK_ALL.RISK_VAL END AS RISK_VAL , TG.TONGJE_VAL , ' ' AS BF_LV , CASE WHEN T1.BRNO IS NULL THEN ROUND(RK.BF_RISK_VAL * ( 1 - TG.BF_TONGJE_VAL/100 ), 2 ) ELSE ROUND(RK_ALL.BF_RISK_VAL * ( 1 - TG.BF_TONGJE_VAL/100 ), 2 ) END AS BF_JAN , CASE WHEN T1.BRNO IS NULL THEN RK.BF_RISK_VAL ELSE RK_ALL.BF_RISK_VAL END AS BF_RISK_VAL , TG.BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM ( --고유위험 SELECT A.BRNO ,A.RISK_VAL ,NVL(B.RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL FROM ( SELECT BRNO , SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS RISK_VAL FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BRNO ) A , ( SELECT BRNO , SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS RISK_VAL FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) GROUP BY BRNO ) B WHERE A.BRNO = B.BRNO(+) ) RK , ( --고유위험 SELECT ROUND(AVG(RISK_VAL),2) AS RISK_VAL ,ROUND(AVG(BF_RISK_VAL),2) AS BF_RISK_VAL FROM ( SELECT A.BRNO ,A.RISK_VAL ,NVL(B.RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL FROM ( SELECT BRNO , SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS RISK_VAL FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY BRNO ) A , ( SELECT BRNO , SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS RISK_VAL FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) AND BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY BRNO ) B WHERE A.BRNO = B.BRNO(+) ) ) RK_ALL , ( --통제 SELECT BRNO , ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN TONGJE_VAL > 0 THEN TONGJE_VAL END ),2) AS TONGJE_VAL , ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN BF_TONGJE_VAL > 0 THEN BF_TONGJE_VAL END),2) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM ( SELECT A.BRNO , A.CNTL_ELMN_C , CASE WHEN A.TONGJE_VAL IS NULL AND B.TONGJE_VAL IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN A.TONGJE_VAL IS NULL AND B.TONGJE_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN B.TONGJE_VAL ELSE A.TONGJE_VAL END AS TONGJE_VAL , CASE WHEN A.BF_TONGJE_VAL IS NULL AND B.BF_TONGJE_VAL IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN A.BF_TONGJE_VAL IS NULL AND B.BF_TONGJE_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN B.BF_TONGJE_VAL ELSE A.BF_TONGJE_VAL END AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM ( --부점별 , 통제요소 평균점수 SELECT BRNO , CNTL_ELMN_C , AVG(TONGJE_VAL) AS TONGJE_VAL , AVG(BF_TONGJE_VAL) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BRNO , CNTL_ELMN_C ) A , ( --통제요소별 평균점수 SELECT CNTL_ELMN_C , AVG(TONGJE_VAL) AS TONGJE_VAL , AVG(BF_TONGJE_VAL) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY CNTL_ELMN_C ) B WHERE A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C ) GROUP BY BRNO
) TG , (SELECT DTL_C AS BRNO FROM SRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE GRP_C = 'R344' ) T1 WHERE TG.BRNO = RK.BRNO(+) AND TG.BRNO = T1.BRNO(+) ) , ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) C

INSERT INTO SRBA_FINAL_EVAL ( BAS_YYMM , BRNO , FINAL_LV , FINAL_VAL , FINAL_UP_DOWN , FINAL_COLOR , RISK_VAL , RISK_UP_DOWN , RISK_COLOR , TONGJE_VAL , TONGJE_UP_DOWN , TONGJE_COLOR , BF_FINAL_LV , BF_FINAL_VAL , BF_FINAL_UP_DOWN , BF_FINAL_COLOR , BF_RISK_VAL , BF_RISK_UP_DOWN , BF_RISK_COLOR , BF_TONGJE_VAL , BF_TONGJE_UP_DOWN , BF_TONGJE_COLOR , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , BRNO , '' AS FINAL_LV , JAN AS FINAL_VAL , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN JAN > BF_JAN THEN '▲' WHEN JAN < BF_JAN THEN '▼' ELSE '-' END AS FINAL_UP_DOWN , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '0' WHEN JAN > BF_JAN THEN 'R' WHEN JAN < BF_JAN THEN 'B' ELSE '0' END AS FINAL_COLOR , RISK_VAL AS RISK_VAL , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN RISK_VAL > BF_RISK_VAL THEN '▲' WHEN RISK_VAL < BF_RISK_VAL THEN '▼' ELSE '-' END AS RISK_UP_DOWN , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '0' WHEN RISK_VAL > BF_RISK_VAL THEN 'R' WHEN RISK_VAL < BF_RISK_VAL THEN 'B' ELSE '0' END AS RISK_COLOR , TONGJE_VAL AS TONGJE_VAL , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN TONGJE_VAL > BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN '▲' WHEN TONGJE_VAL < BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN '▼' ELSE '-' END AS TONGJE_UP_DOWN , CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN '0' WHEN TONGJE_VAL > BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN 'R' WHEN TONGJE_VAL < BF_TONGJE_VAL THEN 'B' ELSE '0' END AS TONGJE_COLOR , '' AS BF_FINAL_LV , DECODE(C.BAS_YYMM ,NULL, '', BF_JAN ) AS BF_FINAL_VAL , '' AS BF_FINAL_UP_DOWN , '' AS BF_FINAL_COLOR , DECODE(C.BAS_YYMM ,NULL, '', BF_RISK_VAL ) AS BF_RISK_VAL , '' AS BF_RISK_UP_DOWN , '' AS BF_RISK_COLOR , DECODE(C.BAS_YYMM ,NULL, '', BF_TONGJE_VAL ) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL , '' AS BF_TONGJE_UP_DOWN , '' AS BF_TONGJE_COLOR , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME ,'BATCH' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT TG.BRNO , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = TG.BRNO ) AS BRNO_NM , ' ' AS LV , ROUND(RK.RISK_VAL * ( 1 - TG.TONGJE_VAL/100 ), 2 ) AS JAN , RK.RISK_VAL , TG.TONGJE_VAL , ' ' AS BF_LV , ROUND(RK.BF_RISK_VAL * ( 1 - TG.BF_TONGJE_VAL/100 ), 2 ) AS BF_JAN , RK.BF_RISK_VAL AS BF_RISK_VAL , TG.BF_TONGJE_VAL AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM ( --고유위험 SELECT '99999' AS BRNO , ROUND(AVG(RISK_VAL),2) AS RISK_VAL , ROUND(AVG(BF_RISK_VAL),2) AS BF_RISK_VAL FROM ( SELECT A.BRNO ,A.RISK_VAL ,NVL(B.RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL FROM ( SELECT BRNO , SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS RISK_VAL FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY BRNO ) A , ( SELECT BRNO , SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS RISK_VAL FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) AND BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY BRNO ) B WHERE A.BRNO = B.BRNO(+) ) ) RK , ( --통제 SELECT '99999' AS BRNO , ROUND(TONGJE_VAL,2) TONGJE_VAL , ROUND(BF_TONGJE_VAL,2) BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM ( SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN TONGJE_VAL > 0 THEN TONGJE_VAL END) AS TONGJE_VAL , AVG(CASE WHEN BF_TONGJE_VAL > 0 THEN BF_TONGJE_VAL END) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} ) ) TG WHERE TG.BRNO = RK.BRNO(+)
) , ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) C

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE ( BAS_YYMM , CNTL_CATG1_C , CNTL_CATG2_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , BRNO , RANK , TONGJE_VAL , BF_TONGJE_VAL , UP_DOWN_INFO , UP_DOWN_COLOR , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.CNTL_CATG1_C , A.CNTL_CATG2_C , A.CNTL_ELMN_C , A.BRNO , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY A.BRNO ORDER BY A.TONGJE_VAL DESC ) AS RANK , ROUND( A.TONGJE_VAL , 2 ) AS TONGJE_VAL , NVL(B.TONGJE_VAL,0) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL , CASE WHEN NVL(A.TONGJE_VAL,0) = NVL(B.TONGJE_VAL,0) THEN '유지' WHEN NVL(A.TONGJE_VAL,0) > NVL(B.TONGJE_VAL,0) THEN '상승' ELSE '하락' END AS UP_DOWN_INFO , CASE WHEN NVL(A.TONGJE_VAL,0) = NVL(B.TONGJE_VAL,0) THEN '0' WHEN NVL(A.TONGJE_VAL,0) > NVL(B.TONGJE_VAL,0) THEN 'R' ELSE 'B' END AS UP_DOWN_COLOR , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'BATCH' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT T.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM , T.CNTL_CATG1_C AS CNTL_CATG1_C , T.CNTL_CATG2_C AS CNTL_CATG2_C , T.CNTL_ELMN_C AS CNTL_ELMN_C , T.BRNO AS BRNO , CASE WHEN M.BRNO IS NOT NULL THEN M.CNT_PNT ELSE AVER.TONGJE_VAL END AS TONGJE_VAL FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , C.CNTL_CATG1_C , C.CNTL_CATG2_C , C.CNTL_ELMN_C , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , SRBA_CNTL_ELMN_M C WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND A.BAS_YYMM = C.BAS_YYMM AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD ) T , ( SELECT CNTL_ELMN_C , BRNO , CNT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} ) M , ( --통제요소별 평균점수 SELECT CNTL_ELMN_C , ROUND(AVG(CNT_PNT),2) AS TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY CNTL_ELMN_C ) AVER WHERE T.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND T.CNTL_ELMN_C = M.CNTL_ELMN_C(+) AND T.BRNO = M.BRNO(+) AND T.CNTL_ELMN_C = AVER.CNTL_ELMN_C(+) ) A , ( SELECT T.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM , T.CNTL_CATG1_C AS CNTL_CATG1_C , T.CNTL_CATG2_C AS CNTL_CATG2_C , T.CNTL_ELMN_C AS CNTL_ELMN_C , T.BRNO AS BRNO , CASE WHEN M.BRNO IS NOT NULL THEN M.CNT_PNT ELSE AVER.TONGJE_VAL END AS TONGJE_VAL FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , C.CNTL_CATG1_C , C.CNTL_CATG2_C , C.CNTL_ELMN_C , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , SRBA_CNTL_ELMN_M C WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) AND A.BAS_YYMM = C.BAS_YYMM AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD ) T , ( SELECT CNTL_ELMN_C , BRNO , CNT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) AND WRITEN_YN = '1' ) M , ( --통제요소별 평균점수 SELECT CNTL_ELMN_C , ROUND(AVG(CNT_PNT),2) AS TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) GROUP BY CNTL_ELMN_C ) AVER WHERE T.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{basYymm} ) AND T.CNTL_ELMN_C = M.CNTL_ELMN_C(+) AND T.BRNO = M.BRNO(+) AND T.CNTL_ELMN_C = AVER.CNTL_ELMN_C(+) ) B WHERE A.BRNO = B.BRNO(+) AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C(+)
mapper.delete: SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_VALT_SCHD_R ( BAS_YYMM , ACT_BASIC , ACT_SCHD , EVL_TERM , EVL_BRNO , EVL_SYSTEM , ALL_BAS_YYYY , ALL_RISK_VAL , ALL_TONGJE_VAL , ALL_REMDR_VAL , ALL_RISK_WAY , ALL_TONGJE_WAY , ALL_REMDR_WAY , ALL_NOTE , ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY , ALL_PRE_RISK_VAL , ALL_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , ALL_PRE_REMDR_VAL , REMDR_BAS_YYYY , REMDR_R1_VAL , REMDR_R2_VAL , REMDR_R3_VAL , REMDR_R4_VAL , REMDR_R5_VAL , REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL , REMDR_NOTE , TOP1_BRNO , TOP1_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_RISK_VAL , TOP1_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_REMDR_VAL , TOP1_RISK_WAY , TOP1_TONGJE_WAY , TOP1_REMDR_WAY , TOP1_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_BRNO , TOP2_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_RISK_VAL , TOP2_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_RISK_WAY , TOP2_TONGJE_WAY , TOP2_REMDR_WAY , TOP2_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_BRNO , TOP3_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_RISK_VAL , TOP3_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_RISK_WAY , TOP3_TONGJE_WAY , TOP3_REMDR_WAY , TOP3_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_BRNO , TOP4_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_RISK_VAL , TOP4_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_RISK_WAY , TOP4_TONGJE_WAY , TOP4_REMDR_WAY , TOP4_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_BRNO , TOP5_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_RISK_VAL , TOP5_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_RISK_WAY , TOP5_TONGJE_WAY , TOP5_REMDR_WAY , TOP5_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP_NOTE , WEAK_PT1_NM , WEAK_PT2_NM , WEAK_PT3_NM , WEAK_PT4_NM , WEAK_PT5_NM , WEAK_PT1_NOTE , WEAK_PT2_NOTE , WEAK_PT3_NOTE , WEAK_PT4_NOTE , WEAK_PT5_NOTE , UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , UPGRADE_NOTE , BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , BRNO_UPGRADE_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK1_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK2_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK3_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK4_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK1_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK2_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK3_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK4_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK1_BRNO , UPGRADE_WEAK2_BRNO , UPGRADE_WEAK3_BRNO , UPGRADE_WEAK4_BRNO , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) WITH R_COUNT AS ( SELECT REMDR_RSK_GD_C, CUR_BRNO_CNT, PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C, NVL(C.CUR_BRNO_CNT, 0) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT, NVL(P.PRE_BRNO_CNT , 0) AS PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A ON F.FINAL_VAL >= A.GD_S_SECT AND F.FINAL_VAL < A.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) C FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON F.BF_FINAL_VAL >= B.GD_S_SECT AND F.BF_FINAL_VAL < B.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) P ON P.GD = C.GD WHERE COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) IS NOT NULL ) ) , TOP5 AS ( SELECT F.BAS_YYMM , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY F.FINAL_VAL DESC) AS NUM , F.BRNO , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '삼성증권' ELSE (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD) END AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '전체' ELSE DECODE(BR.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) END AS MOFC_BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '삼성증권' ELSE BR.DPRT_NM END AS BRNO_NM , A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C , F.FINAL_VAL , CASE WHEN F.FINAL_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.FINAL_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS FINAL_UP_DOWN , F.RISK_VAL , CASE WHEN F.RISK_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.RISK_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS RISK_UP_DOWN , F.TONGJE_VAL , CASE WHEN F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS TONGJE_UP_DOWN , B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS BF_REMDR_RSK_GD_C , NVL(F.BF_FINAL_VAL,0) AS BF_FINAL_VAL , NVL(F.BF_RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL , NVL(F.BF_TONGJE_VAL,0) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A ON F.FINAL_VAL >= A.GD_S_SECT AND F.FINAL_VAL < A.GD_E_SECT LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON F.BF_FINAL_VAL >= B.GD_S_SECT AND F.BF_FINAL_VAL < B.GD_E_SECT LEFT JOIN NIC41B BR ON BR.DPRT_CD = F.BRNO WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND F.BRNO != '99999' AND F.FINAL_VAL IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM < 6 ORDER BY F.FINAL_VAL DESC ) SELECT BAS_YYMM , ACT_BASIC , '수행 계획 수립 및 보고 : ' || DR_DT || ' 평가항목선정 : ' || EVLTERM1 || ' 보점별 통제평가 실시 : ' || EVLTERM2 || ' 평가결과 분석 : ' || EVLTERM3 || ' 취약점 식별 및 개선 관리 : ' || EVLTERM4 AS ACT_SCHD , EVLTERM5 || '(해당 기간의 데이터 또는 업무 기준 평가)' AS EVL_TERM , BRNOLIST AS EVL_BRNO , '전사 및 보점별 고유위험 및 통제효과성을 평가하고, 고유위험에서 효과적인 통제를 통해 완화된 위험을 제외한, 잔여(나머지)위험의 크기를 산출 고유위험 회사의 영업활동 및 거래 고객의 특성 등에 딸 노출될 수 밖에 없는 자금세탁 위험 통제효과성 회사의 자금세탁위험을 완화, 경감하기 위한 자금세탁방지 업무의 효과성 (잔여위험) = (고유위험) X { 1 - (통제효과성,%) }' AS EVL_SYSTEM , BAS_YYMM AS ALL_BAS_YYYY , RISK_VAL AS ALL_RISK_VAL , TONGJE_VAL AS ALL_TONGJE_VAL , FINAL_VAL AS ALL_REMDR_VAL , RISK_UP_DOWN AS ALL_RISK_WAY , TONGJE_UP_DOWN AS ALL_TONGJE_WAY , FINAL_UP_DOWN AS ALL_REMDR_WAY , NOTE1 AS ALL_NOTE , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY , BF_RISK_VAL AS ALL_PRE_RISK_VAL , BF_TONGJE_VAL AS ALL_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , BF_FINAL_VAL AS ALL_PRE_REMDR_VAL , BAS_YYMM AS REMDR_BAS_YYYY , R1_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R1_VAL , R2_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R2_VAL , R3_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R3_VAL , R4_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R4_VAL , R5_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R5_VAL , R1_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL , R2_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL , R3_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL , R4_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL , R5_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL , NOTE2 AS REMDR_NOTE , TOP1_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP1_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_RISK_VAL , TOP1_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_REMDR_VAL , TOP1_RISK_WAY , TOP1_TONGJE_WAY , TOP1_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP1_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP2_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_RISK_VAL , TOP2_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_RISK_WAY , TOP2_TONGJE_WAY , TOP2_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP2_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP3_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_RISK_VAL , TOP3_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_RISK_WAY , TOP3_TONGJE_WAY , TOP3_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP3_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP4_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_RISK_VAL , TOP4_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_RISK_WAY , TOP4_TONGJE_WAY , TOP4_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP4_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP5_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_RISK_VAL , TOP5_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_RISK_WAY , TOP5_TONGJE_WAY , TOP5_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP5_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL , NOTE3 AS TOP_NOTE , WEAK_PT1_NM , WEAK_PT2_NM , WEAK_PT3_NM , WEAK_PT4_NM , WEAK_PT5_NM , WEAK_PT1_NOTE , WEAK_PT2_NOTE , WEAK_PT3_NOTE , WEAK_PT4_NOTE , WEAK_PT5_NOTE , UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , CASE WHEN UPGRADE_ACT_CNT = 0 OR UPGRADE_REQ_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE UPGRADE_ACT_CNT*100/UPGRADE_REQ_CNT END AS UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , '' AS UPGRADE_NOTE , BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , CASE WHEN BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT = 0 OR BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT*100/BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT END AS BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , '' AS BRNO_UPGRADE_NOTE , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK1_NM , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK2_NM , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK3_NM , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK4_NM , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK1_NOTE , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK2_NOTE , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK3_NOTE , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK4_NOTE , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK1_BRNO , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK2_BRNO , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK3_BRNO , '' AS UPGRADE_WEAK4_BRNO , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'BATCH' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS DR_DT --수행 계획 수립 및 보고 (보고서 생성일자, 수정일자 ) , '「특정금융거래정보의 보고 및 이용 등에 관한 법률」 제3장 제1호 「자금세탁방지 및 공중협박자금조달금지에 관한무령」 제19조(위험관리수준 평가) 제1항 및 제2항' AS ACT_BASIC , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(M.DR_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS EVLTERM1--평가 항목 선정 , ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS EVLTERM2--보점별 통제평가 실시 , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(F.DR_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVLTERM3 --평가결과분석 , ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(IMPRV_STRG_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(IMPRV_RSLT_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS EVLTERM4 --취약점 식별 및 개선관리 , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.TGT_TRN_SDT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.TGT_TRN_EDT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVLTERM5 --평가대상기간 , (SELECT LISTAGG( B.DPRT_NM, ', ' ) FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A, NIC41B B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = '202501' AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD) AS BRNOLIST --평가대상부점 , M.BAS_YYMM --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 YYYYMM , ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM < M.BAS_YYMM ) AS PRE_BAS_YYMM --[결과 취약점] 전회차 YYYYMM , F.RISK_VAL --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 고유위험 , NVL(F.BF_RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL --[결과 취약점] 전회차 고유위험 , F.RISK_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 고유위험 , F.TONGJE_VAL --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 통제효과성 , NVL(F.BF_TONGJE_VAL,0) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL --[결과 취약점] 전회차 통제효과성 , F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 통제효과성 , F.FINAL_VAL --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 잔여위험 , NVL(F.BF_FINAL_VAL,0) AS BF_FINAL_VAL --[결과 취약점] 전회차 잔여위험 , F.FINAL_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 잔여위험 , '[예시] 지난 2099년 10월 FATF 지정 위험국가에 필리핀이 추가되며, 필리핀 국적 고객을 보유한 영업점의 고유위험 점수가 급증함 ' AS NOTE1 --ALL NOTE , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R1' ),0) AS R1_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R1 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R2' ),0) AS R2_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R2 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R3' ),0) AS R3_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R3 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R4' ),0) AS R4_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R4 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R5' ),0) AS R5_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R5 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R1' ),0) AS R1_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R1 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R2' ),0) AS R2_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R2 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R3' ),0) AS R3_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R3 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R4' ),0) AS R4_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R4 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R5' ),0) AS R5_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R5 , '[예시] 전체적으로 R5 및 R4 등급의 부점이 일부 증가하여, 전사 잔여위험에 반영됨 ' AS NOTE2 --[결과 취약점] 전체부점 잔여위험 NOTE , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP1 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP1 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP1 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP2 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP2 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2) AS TOP2_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP2 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP3 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP3 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3) AS TOP3_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP3 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP4 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP4 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4) AS TOP4_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP4 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP5 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP5 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5) AS TOP5_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP5 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 잔여증가표 , '[예시] 인근 공단의 외국 국적 고객이 많이 이용, 국가 위험이 높음 등 샘플 문구를 넣었습니다 ' AS NOTE3 --[결과 취약점] 전체부점 잔여위험 NOTE , '' AS WEAK_PT1_NM --[수행결과및취약점] 주요주제1 , '' AS WEAK_PT2_NM --[수행결과및취약점] 주요주제2 , '' AS WEAK_PT3_NM --[수행결과및취약점] 주요주제3 , '' AS WEAK_PT4_NM --[수행결과및취약점] 주요주제3 , '' AS WEAK_PT5_NM --[수행결과및취약점] 주요주제5 , '' AS WEAK_PT1_NOTE --[수행결과및취약점] 내용1 , '' AS WEAK_PT2_NOTE --[수행결과및취약점] 내용1 , '' AS WEAK_PT3_NOTE --[수행결과및취약점] 내용1 , '' AS WEAK_PT4_NOTE --[수행결과및취약점] 내용1 , '' AS WEAK_PT5_NOTE --[수행결과및취약점] 내용1 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS UPGRADE_REQ_CNT --개선요청건수 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL ) AS UPGRADE_ACT_CNT --개선완료건수 , ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT BRNO) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT --개선요청 부점건수 , ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT BRNO) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL ) AS BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT --개선요청 부점건수 FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M M , SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D D , SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F --잔여 WHERE M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.BAS_YYMM = D.BAS_YYMM AND D.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = '3.4' AND M.BAS_YYMM = F.BAS_YYMM AND F.BRNO = '99999' )

MERGE INTO SRBA_VALT_SCHD_R T USING ( WITH R_COUNT AS ( SELECT REMDR_RSK_GD_C, CUR_BRNO_CNT, PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C, NVL(C.CUR_BRNO_CNT, 0) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT, NVL(P.PRE_BRNO_CNT , 0) AS PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A ON F.FINAL_VAL >= A.GD_S_SECT AND F.FINAL_VAL < A.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) C FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON F.BF_FINAL_VAL >= B.GD_S_SECT AND F.BF_FINAL_VAL < B.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) P ON P.GD = C.GD WHERE COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) IS NOT NULL ) ) , TOP5 AS ( SELECT F.BAS_YYMM , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY F.FINAL_VAL DESC) AS NUM , F.BRNO , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '삼성증권' ELSE (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD) END AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '전체' ELSE DECODE(BR.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) END AS MOFC_BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '삼성증권' ELSE BR.DPRT_NM END AS BRNO_NM , A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C , F.FINAL_VAL , CASE WHEN F.FINAL_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.FINAL_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS FINAL_UP_DOWN , F.RISK_VAL , CASE WHEN F.RISK_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.RISK_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS RISK_UP_DOWN , F.TONGJE_VAL , CASE WHEN F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS TONGJE_UP_DOWN , B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS BF_REMDR_RSK_GD_C , NVL(F.BF_FINAL_VAL,0) AS BF_FINAL_VAL , NVL(F.BF_RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL , NVL(F.BF_TONGJE_VAL,0) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A ON F.FINAL_VAL >= A.GD_S_SECT AND F.FINAL_VAL < A.GD_E_SECT LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON F.BF_FINAL_VAL >= B.GD_S_SECT AND F.BF_FINAL_VAL < B.GD_E_SECT LEFT JOIN NIC41B BR ON BR.DPRT_CD = F.BRNO WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND F.BRNO != '99999' AND F.FINAL_VAL IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM < 6 ORDER BY F.FINAL_VAL DESC ) SELECT BAS_YYMM , ACT_BASIC , '수행 계획 수립 및 보고 : ' || DR_DT || ' 평가항목선정 : ' || EVLTERM1 || ' 보점별 통제평가 실시 : ' || EVLTERM2 || ' 평가결과 분석 : ' || EVLTERM3 || ' 취약점 식별 및 개선 관리 : ' || EVLTERM4 AS ACT_SCHD , EVLTERM5 || '(해당 기간의 데이터 또는 업무 기준 평가)' AS EVL_TERM , BRNOLIST AS EVL_BRNO , '전사 및 보점별 고유위험 및 통제효과성을 평가하고, 고유위험에서 효과적인 통제를 통해 완화된 위험을 제외한, 잔여(나머지)위험의 크기를 산출 고유위험 회사의 영업활동 및 거래 고객의 특성 등에 딸 노출될 수 밖에 없는 자금세탁 위험 통제효과성 회사의 자금세탁위험을 완화, 경감하기 위한 자금세탁방지 업무의 효과성 (잔여위험) = (고유위험) X { 1 - (통제효과성,%) }' AS EVL_SYSTEM , BAS_YYMM AS ALL_BAS_YYYY , RISK_VAL AS ALL_RISK_VAL , NVL(TONGJE_VAL,0) AS ALL_TONGJE_VAL , NVL(FINAL_VAL,0) AS ALL_REMDR_VAL , RISK_UP_DOWN AS ALL_RISK_WAY , TONGJE_UP_DOWN AS ALL_TONGJE_WAY , FINAL_UP_DOWN AS ALL_REMDR_WAY , NOTE1 AS ALL_NOTE , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY , BF_RISK_VAL AS ALL_PRE_RISK_VAL , BF_TONGJE_VAL AS ALL_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , BF_FINAL_VAL AS ALL_PRE_REMDR_VAL , BAS_YYMM AS REMDR_BAS_YYYY , R1_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R1_VAL , R2_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R2_VAL , R3_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R3_VAL , R4_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R4_VAL , R5_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R5_VAL , R1_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL , R2_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL , R3_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL , R4_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL , R5_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL , NOTE2 AS REMDR_NOTE , TOP1_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP1_BAS_YYYY , NVL(TOP1_RISK_VAL,0) AS TOP1_RISK_VAL , NVL(TOP1_TONGJE_VAL,0) AS TOP1_TONGJE_VAL , NVL(TOP1_REMDR_VAL,0) AS TOP1_REMDR_VAL , TOP1_RISK_WAY , TOP1_TONGJE_WAY , TOP1_REMDR_WAY , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS EVLTERM1--평가 항목 선정 , ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ , F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 통제효과성 , F.FINAL_VAL --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 잔여위험 , NVL(F.BF_FINAL_VAL,0) AS BF_FINAL_VAL --[결과 취약점] 전회차 잔여위험 , F.FINAL_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 잔여위험 , '[예시] 지난 2099년 10월 FATF UPDATE SRBA_VALT_SCHD_R SET ( ACT_BASIC , ACT_SCHD , EVL_TERM , EVL_BRNO , EVL_SYSTEM , ALL_BAS_YYYY , ALL_RISK_VAL , ALL_TONGJE_VAL , ALL_REMDR_VAL , ALL_RISK_WAY , ALL_TONGJE_WAY , ALL_REMDR_WAY , ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY , ALL_PRE_RISK_VAL , ALL_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , ALL_PRE_REMDR_VAL , REMDR_BAS_YYYY , REMDR_R1_VAL , REMDR_R2_VAL , REMDR_R3_VAL , REMDR_R4_VAL , REMDR_R5_VAL , REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL , TOP1_BRNO , TOP1_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_RISK_VAL , TOP1_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_REMDR_VAL , TOP1_RISK_WAY , TOP1_TONGJE_WAY , TOP1_REMDR_WAY , TOP1_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_BRNO , TOP2_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_RISK_VAL , TOP2_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_RISK_WAY , TOP2_TONGJE_WAY , TOP2_REMDR_WAY , TOP2_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_BRNO , TOP3_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_RISK_VAL , TOP3_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_RISK_WAY , TOP3_TONGJE_WAY , TOP3_REMDR_WAY , TOP3_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_BRNO , TOP4_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_RISK_VAL , TOP4_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_RISK_WAY , TOP4_TONGJE_WAY , TOP4_REMDR_WAY , TOP4_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_BRNO , TOP5_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_RISK_VAL , TOP5_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_RISK_WAY , TOP5_TONGJE_WAY , TOP5_REMDR_WAY , TOP5_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL , UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) = ( WITH R_COUNT AS ( SELECT REMDR_RSK_GD_C, CUR_BRNO_CNT, PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C, NVL(C.CUR_BRNO_CNT, 0) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT, NVL(P.PRE_BRNO_CNT , 0) AS PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A ON F.FINAL_VAL >= A.GD_S_SECT AND F.FINAL_VAL < A.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) C FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON F.BF_FINAL_VAL >= B.GD_S_SECT AND F.BF_FINAL_VAL < B.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) P ON P.GD = C.GD WHERE COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) IS NOT NULL ) ) , TOP5 AS ( SELECT F.BAS_YYMM , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY F.FINAL_VAL DESC) AS NUM , F.BRNO , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '삼성증권' ELSE (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD) END AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '전체' ELSE DECODE(BR.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) END AS MOFC_BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN BR.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '삼성증권' ELSE BR.DPRT_NM END AS BRNO_NM , A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C , F.FINAL_VAL , CASE WHEN F.FINAL_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.FINAL_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS FINAL_UP_DOWN , F.RISK_VAL , CASE WHEN F.RISK_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.RISK_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS RISK_UP_DOWN , F.TONGJE_VAL , CASE WHEN F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' WHEN F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' ELSE '유지(-)' END AS TONGJE_UP_DOWN , B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS BF_REMDR_RSK_GD_C , NVL(F.BF_FINAL_VAL,0) AS BF_FINAL_VAL , NVL(F.BF_RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL , NVL(F.BF_TONGJE_VAL,0) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A ON F.FINAL_VAL >= A.GD_S_SECT AND F.FINAL_VAL < A.GD_E_SECT LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON F.BF_FINAL_VAL >= B.GD_S_SECT AND F.BF_FINAL_VAL < B.GD_E_SECT LEFT JOIN NIC41B BR ON BR.DPRT_CD = F.BRNO WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND F.BRNO != '99999' AND F.FINAL_VAL IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM < 6 ORDER BY F.FINAL_VAL DESC ) SELECT ACT_BASIC , '수행 계획 수립 및 보고 : ' || DR_DT || ' 평가항목선정 : ' || EVLTERM1 || ' 보점별 통제평가 실시 : ' || EVLTERM2 || ' 평가결과 분석 : ' || EVLTERM3 || ' 취약점 식별 및 개선 관리 : ' || EVLTERM4 AS ACT_SCHD , EVLTERM5 || '(해당 기간의 데이터 또는 업무 기준 평가)' AS EVL_TERM , BRNOLIST AS EVL_BRNO , '전사 및 보점별 고유위험 및 통제효과성을 평가하고, 고유위험에서 효과적인 통제를 통해 완화된 위험을 제외한, 잔여(나머지)위험의 크기를 산출 고유위험 회사의 영업활동 및 거래 고객의 특성 등에 딸 노출될 수 밖에 없는 자금세탁 위험 통제효과성 회사의 자금세탁위험을 완화, 경감하기 위한 자금세탁방지 업무의 효과성 (잔여위험) = (고유위험) X { 1 - (통제효과성,%) }' AS EVL_SYSTEM , BAS_YYMM AS ALL_BAS_YYYY , RISK_VAL AS ALL_RISK_VAL , TONGJE_VAL AS ALL_TONGJE_VAL , FINAL_VAL AS ALL_REMDR_VAL , RISK_UP_DOWN AS ALL_RISK_WAY , TONGJE_UP_DOWN AS ALL_TONGJE_WAY , FINAL_UP_DOWN AS ALL_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY , BF_RISK_VAL AS ALL_PRE_RISK_VAL , BF_TONGJE_VAL AS ALL_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , BF_FINAL_VAL AS ALL_PRE_REMDR_VAL , BAS_YYMM AS REMDR_BAS_YYYY , R1_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R1_VAL , R2_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R2_VAL , R3_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R3_VAL , R4_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R4_VAL , R5_CUR_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R5_VAL , R1_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL , R2_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL , R3_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL , R4_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL , R5_PRE_BRNO_CNT AS REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL , TOP1_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP1_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_RISK_VAL , TOP1_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_REMDR_VAL , TOP1_RISK_WAY , TOP1_TONGJE_WAY , TOP1_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP1_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP2_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_RISK_VAL , TOP2_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_RISK_WAY , TOP2_TONGJE_WAY , TOP2_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP2_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP3_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_RISK_VAL , TOP3_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_RISK_WAY , TOP3_TONGJE_WAY , TOP3_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP3_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP4_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_RISK_VAL , TOP4_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_RISK_WAY , TOP4_TONGJE_WAY , TOP4_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP4_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_BRNO , BAS_YYMM AS TOP5_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_RISK_VAL , TOP5_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_RISK_WAY , TOP5_TONGJE_WAY , TOP5_REMDR_WAY , PRE_BAS_YYMM AS TOP5_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL , UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , CASE WHEN UPGRADE_ACT_CNT = 0 OR UPGRADE_REQ_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE UPGRADE_ACT_CNT*100/UPGRADE_REQ_CNT END AS UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , CASE WHEN BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT = 0 OR BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT*100/BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT END AS BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'BATCH' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS DR_DT --수행 계획 수립 및 보고 (보고서 생성일자, 수정일자 ) , '「특정금융거래정보의 보고 및 이용 등에 관한 법률」 제3장 제1호 「자금세탁방지 및 공중협박자금조달금지에 관한무령」 제19조(위험관리수준 평가) 제1항 및 제2항' AS ACT_BASIC , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(M.DR_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS EVLTERM1--평가 항목 선정 , ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(DR_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS EVLTERM2--보점별 통제평가 실시 , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(F.DR_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVLTERM3 --평가결과분석 , ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(IMPRV_STRG_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(IMPRV_RSLT_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS EVLTERM4 --취약점 식별 및 개선관리 , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.TGT_TRN_SDT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.TGT_TRN_EDT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVLTERM5 --평가대상기간 , (SELECT LISTAGG( B.DPRT_NM, ', ' ) FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A, NIC41B B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = '202501' AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD) AS BRNOLIST --평가대상부점 , M.BAS_YYMM --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 YYYYMM , ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM < M.BAS_YYMM ) AS PRE_BAS_YYMM --[결과 취약점] 전회차 YYYYMM , F.RISK_VAL --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 고유위험 , NVL(F.BF_RISK_VAL,0) AS BF_RISK_VAL --[결과 취약점] 전회차 고유위험 , F.RISK_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 고유위험 , F.TONGJE_VAL --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 통제효과성 , NVL(F.BF_TONGJE_VAL,0) AS BF_TONGJE_VAL --[결과 취약점] 전회차 통제효과성 , F.TONGJE_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 통제효과성 , F.FINAL_VAL --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 잔여위험 , NVL(F.BF_FINAL_VAL,0) AS BF_FINAL_VAL --[결과 취약점] 전회차 잔여위험 , F.FINAL_UP_DOWN --[결과 취약점] 증가감소 잔여위험 , '[예시] 지난 2099년 10월 FATF 지정 위험국가에 필리핀이 추가되며, 필리핀 국적 고객을 보유한 영업점의 고유위험 점수가 급증함 ' AS NOTE1 --ALL NOTE , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R1' ),0) AS R1_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R1 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R2' ),0) AS R2_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R2 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R3' ),0) AS R3_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R3 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R4' ),0) AS R4_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R4 , NVL(( SELECT CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R5' ),0) AS R5_CUR_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 평가회차 R5 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R1' ),0) AS R1_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R1 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R2' ),0) AS R2_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R2 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R3' ),0) AS R3_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R3 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R4' ),0) AS R4_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R4 , NVL(( SELECT PRE_BRNO_CNT FROM R_COUNT WHERE REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R5' ),0) AS R5_PRE_BRNO_CNT --[결과 취약점] 전회차 R5 , '[예시] 전체적으로 R5 및 R4 등급의 부점이 일부 증가하여, 전사 잔여위험에 반영됨 ' AS NOTE2 --[결과 취약점] 전체부점 잔여위험 NOTE , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP1 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP1 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP1 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 1 ) AS TOP1_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP1 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP2 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP2 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2) AS TOP2_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP2 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS TOP2_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP2 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP3 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP3 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3) AS TOP3_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP3 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS TOP3_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP3 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP4 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP4 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4) AS TOP4_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP4 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 4 ) AS TOP4_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP4 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT BRNO FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_BRNO --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 부점명 , ( SELECT RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 위험점수 , ( SELECT BF_RISK_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP5 위험점수 , ( SELECT RISK_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_RISK_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 위험증가표 , ( SELECT TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 통제점수 , ( SELECT BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP5 통제점수 , ( SELECT TONGJE_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5) AS TOP5_TONGJE_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 통제증가표 , ( SELECT FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 잔여점수 , ( SELECT BF_FINAL_VAL FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL --[TOP5고위험] 전회차 TOP5 잔여점수 , ( SELECT FINAL_UP_DOWN FROM TOP5 WHERE NUM = 5 ) AS TOP5_REMDR_WAY --[TOP5고위험] 평가회차 TOP5 잔여증가표 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS UPGRADE_REQ_CNT --개선요청건수 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL ) AS UPGRADE_ACT_CNT --개선완료건수 , ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT BRNO) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM ) AS BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT --개선요청 부점건수 , ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT BRNO) FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL ) AS BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT --개선요청 부점건수 FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M M , SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D D , SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F --잔여 WHERE M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.BAS_YYMM = D.BAS_YYMM AND D.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = '3.4' AND M.BAS_YYMM = F.BAS_YYMM AND F.BRNO = '99999' ) )
mapper.sql: SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,VALT_METH_C ,INSTR(JIPYO_SRC,'FIU') JIPTYO_TYPE ,M.JIPYO_SRC ,(CASE WHEN LENGTH(CONCAT('O',TRIM(REPLACE(JIPYO_SRC,'KoFIU')))) < 7 THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(SUBSTR(CONCAT('O',TRIM(REPLACE(JIPYO_SRC,'KoFIU'))),0,3),0),SUBSTR(CONCAT('O',TRIM(REPLACE(JIPYO_SRC,'KoFIU'))),4)) ELSE CONCAT('O',TRIM(REPLACE(JIPYO_SRC,'KoFIU'))) END) JIPYO ,VALT_BRNO ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.JIPYO_OFFR_C = '2' AND INSTR(JIPYO_SRC,'FIU') > 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SRBA_V_TONGJE_R(BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, JIPYO_OFFR_C, VALD_VALT_METH_C, JIPYO_V, RT_PNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-070102' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT COUNT(*) AS JIPYO_V FROM BC_TBM_EMP A , C_USER B , NIC66B C WHERE TRIM(A.EMP_NO) = B.LOGIN_ID AND A.ENCRP_RMNNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'KYC' -- 임의보고 AND C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' AND (A.RETIR_DT = '00000000' -- 재직중 OR (A.RETIR_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt}) ) ) A WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-120601' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 16) */ B.TRX_BRN_NO AS VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC17B A , IC_TBH_CDD_CLNT B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.ENCRP_RMNNO AND A.GDS_NO != '00' AND B.CLNT_PTN_TP_CODE = '1' AND A.AC_OPN_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} GROUP BY B.TRX_BRN_NO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-120602' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 16) */ B.TRX_BRN_NO AS VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC17B A , IC_TBH_CDD_CLNT B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.ENCRP_RMNNO AND A.GDS_NO != '00' AND B.CLNT_PTN_TP_CODE != '1' AND B.RMN_CNF_MTHD_CODE = '02' AND SUBSTR(DECRYPT(TRIM(A.RNMCNO), 'DBSEC', 'TB_API', 'AES'),4,2) NOT IN ('80','82','89') AND A.AC_OPN_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} GROUP BY B.TRX_BRN_NO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-120603' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 16) */ B.TRX_BRN_NO AS VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC17B A , IC_TBH_CDD_CLNT B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.ENCRP_RMNNO AND A.GDS_NO != '00' AND B.CLNT_PTN_TP_CODE != '1' AND B.RMN_CNF_MTHD_CODE = '02' AND SUBSTR(DECRYPT(TRIM(A.RNMCNO), 'DBSEC', 'TB_API', 'AES'),4,2) IN ('80','82','89') AND A.AC_OPN_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} GROUP BY B.TRX_BRN_NO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)

SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-120604' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 16) */ B.TRX_BRN_NO AS VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC17B A , IC_TBH_CDD_CLNT B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.ENCRP_RMNNO AND A.AGNT_ACNT_YN = '1' AND A.AC_OPN_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 계좌 개설일이 최근1년간 이내 GROUP BY B.TRX_BRN_NO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
UNION ALL

SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-160201' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC40B A WHERE A.EXTRACT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} -- 평가기준시작일 AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 평가기준종료일 ) A WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0),'999,999,999,990.00')) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-190202' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT ROUND((JIPYO_V / TOTAL) * 100 ,2) JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC06B A WHERE A.RSK_GRD_CD = 'H' AND A.AML_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} ) T1 ,( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO),0,1,COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO)) AS TOTAL FROM NIC06B A WHERE A.AML_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} )T2
) A WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-190203' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 16) */ COUNT(DISTINCT A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC35B A , IC_TBH_CDD_CLNT B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.ENCRP_RMNNO AND B.TRX_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} -- 평가기준시작일 AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 평가기준종료일 ) A
WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0),'999,999,999,990.00')) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-210301' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT VALT_BRNO ,ROUND((CNT / DECODE(DEPT_CNT,0,1,DEPT_CNT)) * 100 ,2) JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 , COUNT(*) AS CNT -- 부점별 임의보고 건수 , (SELECT COUNT(*) DEPT_CNT FROM NIC41B WHERE USE_CCD='Y') DEPT_CNT FROM NIC66B A , NIC73B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} -- 평가기준시작일 AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 평가기준종료일 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'KYC' -- 임의보고 AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY C.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) T
) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-210302' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 , COUNT(*) AS JIPYO_V -- 부점별 STR보고 건수 FROM NIC66B A , NIC73B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} -- 평가기준시작일 AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 평가기준종료일 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR' -- STR보고 AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY C.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-220101' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 , COUNT(*) AS JIPYO_V -- 부점별 CTR보고 건수 FROM NIC66B A , NIC73B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} -- 평가기준시작일 AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 평가기준종료일 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' -- CTR보고 AND A.CTR_FWRD_TP_CODE = '1' GROUP BY C.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-220201' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 , COUNT(*) AS JIPYO_V -- 부점별 CTR보고 건수 FROM NIC66B A , NIC73B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} -- 평가기준시작일 AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 평가기준종료일 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' -- CTR보고 AND A.CTR_FWRD_TP_CODE = '1' GROUP BY C.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
UNION ALL
SELECT M.BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, M.VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_OFFR_C ,VALD_VALT_METH_C ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(JIPYO_V,0),'999,999,999,990.00')) JIPYO_V ,RT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.TONGJE_FLD_C ,M.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,M.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,M.TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.JIPYO_OFFR_C ,M.VALD_VALT_METH_C ,(SELECT TONGJE_ALLT FROM SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = M.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = M.TONGJE_MDDV_C) RT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M M ,SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = A.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = 'CF-210401' AND TGT_YN = 1 ) M ,( SELECT VALT_BRNO ,ROUND((CNT / DECODE(TOTAL,0,1,TOTAL))*100 ,2) JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 , COUNT(*) AS CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR') AS TOTAL FROM NIC66B A , NIC73B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} -- 평가기준시작일 AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 평가기준종료일 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR' -- STR보고 AND (A.ANALS_EXTND_DT IS NULL OR A.ANALS_END_DT = A.ANALS_EXTND_DT) AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY C.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) T ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
